metadata.title: Dr. Guilherme Carvalho | Physiotherapist in Natal, Brazil
metadata.description: Specialist physiotherapist in spine care, chiropractic, osteopathy and acupuncture in Natal, Brazil. Individualized treatment for lower back pain, disc herniation, sciatica and more.

hero.titleAccent: Specialist care for disc herniation and sciatica.
hero.descriptionFull: Regain confidence in your spine. Specialist physiotherapist in spine care. Personalized assessment and individualized treatment. In-person in Natal, Brazil and teleconsultation available worldwide.
hero.descriptionShort: Specialist spine physiotherapist. In-person in Natal and online worldwide.
hero.ctaOnline: Book online appointment (Anywhere in the world)
hero.imageAlt: Dr. Guilherme Carvalho holding an anatomical spine model

symptoms.title: Do you experience any of these symptoms?
symptoms.subtitle: Do any of these sound familiar? These may be signs of a condition that needs attention.
symptoms.calloutText: This may be a sign of nerve compression caused by disc herniation or joint dysfunction — and it can get worse if left untreated.

symptoms.group1s0: Pain that runs down your leg to the foot

symptoms.group2s1: Pain after sitting or standing for a long time

services.title: How can I help you?
services.subtitle: Choose the best type of care for your situation
services.onlineNote: Teleconsultation: Answer 5 questions in 2 minutes and find out if I can help you online.
services.ebookTitle: Practical Guide — Relieve Your Disc Herniation and Sciatica
services.ebookSubtitle: For those suffering from lower back pain who want relief without relying only on medication.
services.ebookB3: Strategies to relieve sciatic nerve pain

method.title: From Pain Mapping to your recovery
method.subtitle: A unique process that starts by mapping your pain to treat it at its source
method.step1Desc: Together we create a complete map of your pain: where it hurts, when it worsens, what brings relief. We identify the pattern to treat the cause, not just the symptom.
method.step2Desc: Based on your Pain Map, we build a tailored protocol: specific techniques, ideal frequency and clear recovery goals.
method.step3Desc: Therapeutic exercises, chiropractic, osteopathy, dry needling, acupuncture — we apply the right techniques for your case. Multiple specializations in pain management, always with your active participation.
method.step4Desc: You leave knowing how to take care of your body to prevent relapse. The goal is for you not to depend on me forever.

about.title: Dr. Guilherme Carvalho
about.subtitle: Clinical Physiotherapist · Natal, Brazil
about.bio: With over five years of experience and dozens of specializations in chronic pain, plus postgraduate degrees in Osteopathy, Chiropractic and Acupuncture. I see patients in-person in Natal and online across Brazil and worldwide.
about.quote: My goal is to transform my patients' lives, making them healthier and more confident. I want you to understand how to act in the face of back pain, offering effective treatments that avoid unnecessary medications and surgeries.

triage.title: Quick screening for back pain
triage.subtitle: Answer a few quick questions to find out if online care can help you.
triage.alertNoticeBold: Some symptoms indicate the need for urgent in-person medical care.
triage.q6label: 6. Do you have any of these symptoms?
triage.alertTitle: These symptoms may require urgent in-person medical evaluation.
triage.alertSubtitle: Please seek medical attention as soon as possible.
triage.alertBack: I made a mistake — go back
triage.doneTitle: Your case can be evaluated via online consultation.
triage.doneSubtitle: Click below to schedule your consultation.
triage.waGreeting: Hello, Dr. Guilherme! I completed the online screening and would like to schedule my teleconsultation.
triage.q2label: Does your pain radiate to any limb?
triage.q2o1: No, it stays in the spine
triage.q2o2: Goes to the buttock or thigh
triage.q2o3: Runs down the leg to the foot or toes
triage.q2o4: Goes to the arm or hand
triage.q3label: How long have you had this pain?
triage.q3o4: Comes and goes for months or years
triage.q4label: What usually makes your pain worse?
triage.q4o4: Standing still for a long time
triage.q5label: Have you had imaging done (MRI or CT scan)?
triage.q5o2: Yes, but I don't remember the result
triage.q5o4: I suspect I have a herniation
triage.d1: Complete loss of strength in leg or arm
triage.d2: Difficulty controlling urination or bowel movements
triage.d3: Intense numbness in the groin area
triage.d5: Incapacitating pain that does not improve in any position
triage.q7o2: Yes, but I still have pain

metadata.title: Chiropractic Care in Natal, Brazil | Dr. Guilherme Carvalho — Spine, Disc Herniation & Sciatica
metadata.description: Chiropractic care in Natal with a specialist physiotherapist: chiropractic, osteopathy, dry needling and manual therapy for low back pain, disc herniation and sciatica. Book your assessment.

hero.title: Move better. Live better.
hero.subtitle: In-person care in Natal for spine pain, herniated disc and sciatic nerve, with personalized treatment.
hero.videoAria: Video of treatments at the clinic: chiropractic, dry needling and manual therapy

about.title: Meet Dr. Guilherme Carvalho
about.p1: Physiotherapist specializing in manual therapy, dedicated to treating spine pain, disc herniation and sciatica in Natal, Brazil. Every patient gets a thorough assessment and an individual treatment plan — no generic protocols.
about.p2: The philosophy is simple: find the source of the pain, treat it with the right techniques — chiropractic, osteopathy, dry needling — and restore movement safely, with close follow-up.
about.imageAlt: Dr. Guilherme Carvalho, physiotherapist and chiropractic practitioner in Natal, Brazil

conditions.title: Pain and conditions we treat at the clinic
conditions.subtitle: From acute pain to restricted movement — treatment based on assessment, not guesswork.

techniques.title: Real manual therapy, technique by technique

quiropraxia.name: Chiropractic
quiropraxia.text: Precise joint adjustments to restore spinal movement and relieve low back, neck and thoracic pain.

osteopatia.name: Osteopathy
osteopatia.text: A whole-body approach: joints, muscles and fascia treated together to solve the cause of pain, not just the symptom.

dryNeedling.name: Dry Needling
dryNeedling.text: Dry needling of trigger points to release deep muscle contractures and radiating pain.

miofascial.name: Myofascial Release
miofascial.text: Hands-on fascia techniques to reduce tension, improve circulation and restore tissue elasticity.

ventosa.name: Cupping Therapy
ventosa.text: Controlled suction that improves local blood flow and supports muscle recovery.

neural.name: Neural Mobilization
neural.text: Specific movements that free nerve gliding — essential for sciatica and tingling.

exercicios.name: Therapeutic Exercise
exercicios.text: Individually prescribed exercises to stabilize the spine and keep pain from coming back.

techniques.imageAlt: {name} being applied at the clinic in Natal

video.title: How treatment works
video.p1: From first contact to discharge: thorough assessment, a clear explanation of your functional diagnosis, and treatment with the techniques that make sense for your case.
video.p2: Watch to see the clinic, the working method and what to expect from your first chiropractic visit in Natal.

steps.title: Your first visit, step by step

s1.title: Thorough assessment
s1.text: History, physical exam and movement tests to fully understand your condition.

s2.title: Finding the source of pain
s2.text: We don't chase loose symptoms: we locate the structure and pattern causing the pain.

s3.title: Personalized treatment
s3.text: Chiropractic, osteopathy, dry needling — the right techniques for your case, starting at the first session.

s4.title: Specific exercises
s4.text: Individual prescription to strengthen and stabilize what the assessment revealed.

s5.title: Recovery plan
s5.text: Estimated number of sessions, clear goals and reassessments to track progress.

gallery.title: The clinic and the care
gallery.alt1: Physiotherapy and chiropractic clinic in Natal

faq.title: Common questions about chiropractic care
faq.a1: No. Techniques are applied precisely and within each patient's comfort limit. Some people feel mild soreness after the session, which fades within hours.
faq.a2: Yes. Performed by a licensed physiotherapist after a thorough assessment, chiropractic care is safe, with indications and contraindications respected case by case.
faq.a3: Adults of all ages — from athletes to seniors. The initial assessment rules out contraindications and defines the best technique for you.
faq.q4: How long does a visit take?
faq.a4: On average 50 minutes to 1 hour, including assessment and treatment at the first session.
faq.q5: How many sessions are usually needed?
faq.a5: It depends on the case. Acute conditions often respond within a few sessions; chronic ones need a slightly longer plan. You get a clear estimate at the assessment.
faq.a6: Yes. Disc herniation is one of the most frequent conditions at the clinic, treated with manual therapy, neural mobilization and specific exercises.
faq.a7: Yes. Sciatic pain responds very well to the combination of chiropractic, neural mobilization and dry needling, depending on the source found at the assessment.
faq.a8: Care is private, which guarantees one-on-one sessions fully dedicated to your case. We provide receipts for reimbursement with your insurance plan.

finalCta.title: Looking for chiropractic care in Natal?
finalCta.text: Book your in-person assessment and find out the best strategy to treat your pain.
